modern_reader_context.market_surface_rule: Use social discovery, school/work pressure, gaming, creator culture, comic shop/community, and phone-native life without sounding like an ad for platforms.
modern_reader_context.audience_story_rule: Treat online identity, economic pressure, burnout, social performance, fandom, romance boundaries, and self-definition as ordinary life texture.
modern_reader_context.genre_relevance_rule: Modern social issue stories need concrete systems: forms, apps, access gates, family/work pressure, care networks, housing, school, platform labor, or clinic routes.

catalyst.logline: A delivery shift and a school appointment collide at the same gate, exposing the cost everyone has politely not named.

modern_reader_context.craft_directive: Fuse the genre engine with a contemporary reader-world entrypoint. Market=en_US; audience=gen_z. Use catalyst 'delivery_shift_school_gate': A delivery shift and a school appointment collide at the same gate, exposing the cost everyone has politely not named. Transmutation: Schedule conflict becomes social pressure. Market surface: Use social discovery, school/work pressure, gaming, creator culture, comic shop/community, and phone-native life without sounding like an ad for platforms. Audience rule: Treat online identity, economic pressure, burnout, social performance, fandom, romance boundaries, and self-definition as ordinary life texture. Use concrete objects and social pressure on page one; do not name-drop trends.
